pairs.question: Write a Python code snippet to find all individuals with the surname Barron who were born in the 20th century.
pairs.answer:
python
barron_20th_century = [
    person for person in barrons 
    if any(year in str(person.get('birth_year', '')) for year in range(1901, 2001))
]
print(barron_20th_century)

Note: Replace `barrons` with the actual list of individuals containing their birth years.
